title: VeloraOS 1.10.2 - Public Beta Models Access Hotfix
releaseNotes: Keeps both Chat and Models available during public beta.
Restores Models to the primary dock and enables its home card.
Keeps Image Studio, Video Studio and Upgrades marked as coming soon.
Preserves first-setup model selection, accounts, chats, settings, licensing, device identity and secure rollback updates.
